providerBudgets.label: Codex / OpenAI
providerBudgets.lastRouteReason: Default for repo edits, private connectors, auth, terminal execution, approvals, and final integration.
providerBudgets.whyChosen: Default for repo edits, private connectors, auth, terminal execution, approvals, and final integration.

providerBudgets.label: Gemini
providerBudgets.role: JAIMES-first reviewer, evaluator, digest, and long-context synthesis lane
providerBudgets.lastRouteReason: Use Flash first for JAIMES dashboard-safe summaries, digests, reports, log summaries, and stale-task compression; use Pro for explicit deeper compact evaluation; never raw secrets, OAuth payloads, raw mail, or private account data.
providerBudgets.whyChosen: Use Flash first for JAIMES dashboard-safe summaries, digests, reports, log summaries, and stale-task compression; use Pro for explicit deeper compact evaluation; never raw secrets, OAuth payloads, raw mail, or private account data.

providerBudgets.label: xAI / Grok
providerBudgets.role: Current-events, X-native research, outside critique, and batch audit specialist
providerBudgets.lastRouteReason: Use when the task needs X search, web/current-events context, Grok critique, or a non-urgent batch audit. Responses API calls should use store=false and metadata-only Mission Control logging.
providerBudgets.whyChosen: Use when the task needs X search, web/current-events context, Grok critique, or a non-urgent batch audit. Responses API calls should use store=false and metadata-only Mission Control logging.

providerBudgets.label: OpenRouter
providerBudgets.role: Fallback route when primary lanes are unavailable or a specific outside model is needed
providerBudgets.lastRouteReason: Fallback only; prefer Codex, Gemini, or xAI specialist lanes first.
providerBudgets.whyChosen: Fallback only; prefer Codex, Gemini, or xAI specialist lanes first.

codexExhaustedMode.trigger: Set codexAllowanceMode to exhausted when Codex weekly allowance is gone or Josh explicitly requests outage continuity.
codexExhaustedMode.rule: Route dashboard-safe summaries, reviews, digests, stale-task compression, and non-execution synthesis to Gemini. Route public current-events, X-native research, outside critique, and batch audits to xAI. Route explicit non-sensitive fallback checks to OpenRouter. Reserve Codex, OpenAI API, or OpenRouter spend for execution, private connector work, repo edits, terminal actions, approvals, and final integration.
codexExhaustedMode.telegramDisclosure: Josh 2.0 and JAIMES must state Active Model/Auth and Route reason before doing substantive work while this mode is active.

routerPolicy.rule: Codex/OpenAI remains default execution. JAIMES should use Gemini first for dashboard-safe review, digest, reports, stale-task compression, and long-context evaluation when sufficient. Use Gemini Flash for routine throughput and Gemini Pro for explicit deeper compact evaluation. xAI handles X-native/current-events specialist work. OpenRouter is fallback only.
routerPolicy.lastModeChangeReason: add Gemini Pro lane for JAIMES deeper evaluation
